## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / validation check
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New language glossary
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on a real repository
- [ ] All existing scripts still work
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (if behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No dead code, empty functions, or commented-out blocks
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format
- [ ] No sensitive information (API keys, credentials)
